# School's Out Saturdays and the AGI Podcast

> Public home for School's Out Saturdays, a podcast about AI in education, and its companion publications: the No-Code CAIO newsletter and School's Out Field Notes. Part of the AGI Podcast network. This file maps the canonical URLs and machine-readable data so agents can read the site without parsing HTML.

## About

School's Out Saturdays is a podcast for educators making sense of AI without turning school into a tech circus. Its tagline is "preparing students for their future, not our past." It is part of the AGI Podcast network: Advance, Grow, and Innovate with AI. Two written publications extend the show: the No-Code CAIO newsletter for non-technical leaders, and School's Out Field Notes for educators.

## Publications

- [No-Code CAIO newsletter](https://agipodcast.ai/newsletter/): The weekly pulse on real AI work for managers, small-business owners, and nonprofit leaders moving AI from demos into working workflows.
- [School's Out Field Notes](https://agipodcast.ai/field-notes): A weekly companion to School's Out Saturdays. Practical signals, questions, and opportunities from the edge of school and work.

## Podcast

- [School's Out Saturdays on Apple Podcasts](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/agi-advance-grow-innovate-with-ai/id1812450522)
- [School's Out Saturdays on Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/6mijpuwWNrXYvMgRazLfUN)
- [School's Out playlist on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBeGVU933EaEQeGMLi4Vk6D-bXUutguAe)
- [AGI Podcast network](https://agipodcast.ai/network)

## Episode hubs

Per-episode pages with player, summary, guest, and a companion Field Note. More are being added; the full catalog is in the episodes JSON below.

- [Episodes index](https://agipodcast.ai/episodes/): Browsable list of every School's Out Saturdays episode.
- [You Can't Shape What You Won't Use: Anne Leftwich on AI at Indiana University](https://agipodcast.ai/episodes/you-cant-shape-what-you-wont-use): Indiana University's campus-wide ChatGPT rollout, why AI holdouts forfeit their seat at the table, and why K-12 bans fail like abstinence-only everything.

## Machine-readable data

- [Newsletter editions, JSON](https://agipodcast.ai/data/editions.json): Every No-Code CAIO edition with title, url, date, description, and read time.
- [Field Notes issues, JSON](https://agipodcast.ai/data/field-notes.json): Every School's Out Field Notes issue with title, url, date, description, and read time.
- [Podcast episodes, JSON](https://agipodcast.ai/data/episodes.json): Every School's Out Saturdays episode with title, date, YouTube link, topics, summary, and an episode-hub url where one exists.
- [Sitemap](https://agipodcast.ai/sitemap.xml): All public pages.

## Resources

- [NotebookLM Guide for Educators](https://agipodcast.ai/resources/notebooklm-guide.html): A free guide for educators getting started with NotebookLM.
- [AI District Implementation Spotlight Series](https://inlearninglab.com/collections/artificial-intelligence-ai-district-implementation-spotlight-series): Indiana Learning Lab collection on district AI implementation.
- [Indiana Learning Lab AI Resource](https://inlearninglab.com/resources/artificial-intelligence-ai-spotlight-richmond-community-schools?collection=artificial-intelligence-ai-district-implementation-spotlight-series): A Learning Lab resource for Indiana educators exploring district AI implementation. Login may be required.
